[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100010010 3
1 0010000000 1
2 0011110011 6
3 1101100111 7
4 0000101101 4
5 0011100101 5
6 1101110110 7
7 1111111111 a

01 10 1111110111 9
12 21 1101101111 8
23 32 0011101101 6
34 43 1111110111 9
45 54 1111111111 a match 7
56 65 1111111111 a match 7
67 76 1111110111 9
70 07 1011110111 8

02 20 0011111111 8
13 31 1111100111 8
24 42 1101111111 9
35 53 1111111111 a match 7
46 64 1101110111 8
57 75 1111111111 a match 7
60 06 0111110111 8
71 17 1111110111 9

03 30 0011110111 7
14 41 1101110111 8
25 52 1111111111 a match 7
36 63 0111110111 8
47 74 1111110110 8
50 05 1111111111 a match 7
61 16 1101110111 8
72 27 1011111111 9

04 40 1111110111 9
15 51 1111111111 a match 7
26 62 0101111111 8
37 73 1011110111 8
